description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that runs on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9.0-rc.2). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with poetry, run tests with pytest, generate a coverage report, and upload it to Codecov using a CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
